title: String Islemleri
subtitle: Metin manipulasyonu ve formatlama.
code:
<?php

$text = "  Merhaba Playground!  ";

echo "Orijinal: '" . $text . "'\n";
echo "Trim: '" . trim($text) . "'\n";
echo "Buyuk harf: " . strtoupper($text) . "\n";
echo "Kucuk harf: " . strtolower($text) . "\n";
echo "Uzunluk: " . strlen($text) . "\n";

$clean = trim($text);
echo "\nIceriyor mu 'Play': " . (str_contains($clean, "Play") ? "evet" : "hayir") . "\n";

// Bölme
$sentence = "elma,armut,muz,karpuz";
$fruits = explode(",", $sentence);
echo "\nMeyveler:\n";
foreach ($fruits as $fruit) {
    echo "- " . $fruit . "\n";
}

// Birleştirme
$joined = implode(" | ", $fruits);
echo "\nBirlestirilmis: " . $joined . "\n";

// Değiştirme
$replaced = str_replace("Playground", "Dunya", $clean);
echo "\nDegistirilmis: " . $replaced . "\n";

// printf ile formatlama
$name = "Zeynep";
$score = 95;
printf("\n%s sinavdan %d puan aldi.\n", $name, $score);

// Substring
$sub = substr($clean, 0, 7);
echo "\nIlk 7 karakter: " . $sub . "\n";

?>
